description: This passive ability grants you an additional 20/40% chance to resist charm, and 15/30% chance to resist mesmerization spells
name: Adamant Will

description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Alchemy recipes by 10%.
name: Alchemy Mastery

description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Baking recipes by 10%.
name: Baking Mastery

description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Blacksmithing recipes by 10%.
name: Blacksmithing Mastery

description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Brewing recipes by 10%.
name: Brewing Mastery

description: This passive ability increases your endurance regeneration by 1 point.
name: Circular Breathing

description: This passive ability increases your melee avoidance by 2% / 5% /10%. Melee avoidance is the component of armor class that allows you to avoid incoming attacks and is derived from agility, item avoidance, and your defense skill.
name: Combat Agility

description: This passive ability increases your chance of performing a critical melee hit with all skills by 15%.
name: Combat Fury

description: This passive ability increases the armor class soft cap of your class by 2/5%. The armor class soft cap is the amount of armor class that functions at 100% effectiveness. Armor class gains in excess of this cap are reduced in effectiveness by a percentage based on your class and level.
name: Combat Stability

description: Training with the sages and merchants of Norrath gives adventurers the chance to hone their crafting skills. This passive ability allows you to raise 1 additional standard tradeskill (Baking, Blacksmithing, Brewing, Fletching, Jewelcraft, Pottery, or Tailoring) from its initial Specialization cap of 200 up to 300.
name: Crafting Mastery

description: This passive ability grants you an additional 25% chance to resist most fear spells and increases the chance of breaking fear earlier.
name: Fear Resistance

description: This passive ability increases the maximum health you can bind wound to 80%.
name: First Aid

description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Fletching recipes by 10%.
name: Fletching Master

description: This passive ability increases your Forage skill cap by 50 points.
name: Foraging

description: This ability, when activated, will give everyone in your party the option of teleporting directly to your location.
name: Gather Party

description: This passive ability increases your strength, stamina, agility, dexterity, wisdom, intelligence, and charisma by 2 points.
name: Innate Eminence

description: This passive ability increases the amount of air you can hold in your lungs by 10%.
name: Innate Lung Capacity

description: This passive ability reduces your food and drink consumption by 110%.
name: Innate Metablolism

description: This passive ability increases your health regeneration by 1/2 point(s).
name: Innate Regeneration

description: This passive ability increases your cold, disease, fire, magic, and poison resistances by 2 points.
name: Innate Spell Resistance

description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Jewelcrafting recipes by 10%.
name: Jewel Craft Mastery

description: This passive ability increases your maximum base health (derived from your stamina) by 2/5/10/12%.
name: Natural Durability

description: This ability, when activated, transports you back to your starting city. You can check your origin location using the command /charinfo.
name: Origin

description: This passive ability reduces the weight of all equipped and carried items by 5%.
name: Packrat

description: This passive ability extends the duration of your beneficial illusion spells to 16.6 hours and allows them to persist when zoning.
name: Permanent Illusion

description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Pottery recipes by 10%.
name: Pottery Mastery

description: This ability, when activated, will cast all currently memorized beneficial spells on all valid group and raid targets in range, for full mana and reagent cost. NOTE: This ability will continue casting spells even if you have no mana left
name: Quick Buff

description: This passive ability grants you a 15% chance to endure what would otherwise be a stunning melee attack, from any angle, without being stunned.
name: Steadfast Will

description: This passive ability reduces how far incoming melee attacks push you backward by 10%.
name: Stoicism

falls into a state of stoicism.

description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Tailoring recipes by 10%.
name: Tailoring Mastery

description: This passive ability increases the damage dealt by your critical direct damage spells by 30 / 60 / 100%.
name: Destructive Fury

description: This passive ability increases your chance to land a critical hit with your direct damage spells by 2%.
name: Fury of Magic

description: This passive ability makes it impossible for you to fizzle level 20 / 40 / 52 or lower spells.

description: This passive ability increases your mana regeneration by 1 point.

rankSpells.description: Focusing restores mana.

description: This passive ability increases the capacity of your spell casting window allowing you to memorize 1 / 2 / 3 / 4 / 5 / 6 additional spell.
name: Mnemonic Retention

description: This passive ability grants you a 11% chance to regain your concentration and complete a spell cast when stunned.
name: Persistent Casting

description: This passive ability reduces the base cast time of direct damage spells that have an initial cast time of 3 seconds or more by 2/5/10%.
name: Quick Damage

description: This passive ability reduces the cast time of beneficial spells that have a duration and an initial cast time of at least 3 seconds by 10%.
name: Spell Casting Deftness

description: This passive ability reduces the mana cost of all spells by 2%.
name: Spell Casting Mastery

description: This passive ability increases the duration of beneficial spells that you cast by 5%. Spells that grant invulnerability and combat abilities are exempt from this extension.
name: Spell Casting Reinforcement

description: This ability, when activated, doubles the mana cost of your next spell or ability that can be affected by the Mass Group Buff and causes it to land on all allies within the spell's radius.
name: Mass Group Buff

rankSpells.name: Mass Group Buff
rankSpells.description: Causes the next spell or ability that can be affected by the Mass Group Buff focus to be cast on every ally within that spell's radius while also causing that spell or ability to cost twice as much mana or endurance.
rankSpells.resolvedDescription: Causes the next spell or ability that can be affected by the Mass Group Buff focus to be cast on every ally within that spell's radius while also causing that spell or ability to cost twice as much mana or endurance.

description: This passive ability increases the chance your damage over time spells will deal critical damage at each 6 second interval they are active by 3 / 6 / 9%.
name: Critical Affliction

description: This passive ability increases the damage dealt by your critical damage over time spells by 125 / 150 / 175%. Requires Critical Affliction rank 1 / 2 / 3.
name: Destructive Cascade

description: This passive ability increases your flurry chance (up to two extra attacks after a primary slot triple attack) by 10000%.
name: Burst of Power

description: This ability, when activated, performs a single primary slot combat round on all creatures within a 40 foot radius.

rankSpells.resolvedDescription: Hardens your skin and fills your arms with energy, increasing strength and absorbing damage, while also decreasing your agility.
messages: You feel the urge to rampage.

description: This passive ability increases the effectiveness of your instant-duration healing spells by 2%.
name: Healing Adept

description: Increased chance to cast an Exceptional Heal tick on Heal over Time spells by 3 / 6 / 9%. An exceptional heal does double healing.
name: Healing Boon

description: This passive ability grants your instant-duration healing spells a 3% chance to score an exceptional heal. An exceptional heal doubles the healing value of the spell.
name: Healing Gift

description: This passive ability causes successful uses of your intimidate skill to trigger *100Intimidation which causes a level *1000 or lower target to run away in fear for *10030m.

rankSpells.name: Intimidation

rankSpells.resolvedDescription: Anger causes you to see red and also grow in height.

description: This passive ability grants you a 5% chance to perform a double riposte.
name: Double Riposte

description: This passive ability grants your critical melee attacks a 100% chance to deal 100/200% damage to level 50/53 and lower NPC targets with 10/12% or less health.
name: Finishing Blow

description: This passive ability increases your melee avoidance by 2% and your armor class soft cap by 2%.
name: Physical Enhancement

description: This ability, when activated, grants you standard invisibility for up to 20 minutes.
name: Innate Camouflage

description: This passive ability allows you to give your pet advanced commands. Hotkeys for these commands can be created using the pet control window. Hold and Greater Hold - /pet hold -or- /pet ghold When your pet is in the hold state, your pet will only attack something when you tell it to, and your pet will continue to attack anything on its hate list after that point. Once the encounter is finished, your pet will automatically go back to a held state. If your pet is never told to exclusively attack anything, your pet will never attack anything, even if something is attacking it. The greater hold state forces your pet to not add anything to its hatelist unless specifically added by you. You can add a target to your pet's hatelist with either /pet attack or /pet qattack.
name: Companion's Discipline

description: Allows your pet to benefit from group beneficial spells and songs.
name: Pet Affinity

description: This passive ability allows you to gain a second specialization. Specialized schools of magic benefit from a reduction in mana cost and fizzle chance. After acquiring this ability, the next specialization to go over it's current cap becomes your second specialization.
name: Master of All

description: After training in this ability, NPCs will notice your magical activities less.
name: Spell Casting Subtlety

description: This passive ability reduces the reuse time of your Sense Traps and Disarm Traps skills by 1 second.
name: Thief's Intuition

description: This passive ability reduces the damage that you take from falling by increasing the effectiveness of your safe fall skill by 10%.
name: Acrobatics

description: This passive ability increases your chance to successfully dual wield by 32%
name: Ambidexterity

description: This passive ability allows you to use your bash skill while wielding a two-handed weapon.

description: This ability, when activated, teleports all group members within a 100 foot radius to a relatively safe location in your current zone with a 0.1 second cast time.

description: This passive ability further improves the instrument bonus of your songs by 20%. This ability impacts Brass, Percussion, String, and Woodwind songs.
name: Instrument Mastery

description: This passive ability increases the effective casting level of your songs by 1 level. This bonus improves: Songs that get stronger or last longer based on your level. Song stacking priority on targets. The likelihood that songs that dispel effects will succeed. The likelihood that songs that cure blindness will succeed. The likelihood that songs that sense, disarm, or pick locked traps will succeed.
name: Jam Fest

description: This ability is ENABLED. Expend the current rank to disable its effects. This passive ability extends the radius of your beneficial area songs by 10%.

description: This passive ability reduces the amount of time that it takes you to memorize a song by 50%.

description: This passive ability further improves the singing bonus of your songs by 20%. This ability impacts songs that use the Singing skill.

costLabel: 2 / 2 / 3 / 3 / Unknown / Unknown / Unknown / Unknown / Unknown / Unknown
description: This ability is ENABLED. Expend the current rank to disable its effects. This passive ability allows one Bard song to auto pulse. In order for a song to be eligible, it must have no mana cost, have no cooldown, and be a non-targeted area of effect song. Any song that meets these critera cannot be played manually while the ability is turned on. This ability chooses the first eligible song, starting from your final spell gem, and working backwards.
name: Symphonic Aura

description: Area Taunt, when activated, taunts all creatures within a 40 foot radius, placing you 100 points of hate higher than your opponents' previously most hated target.

description: Heroic Leap I, when activated, causes you to leap approximately 10 feet in front of your target, attracting the attention of up to 8 opponents within a 40 foot radius of your target, increasing their hatred for you by 1250 points.
name: Heroic Leap

description: This passive ability increases your melee critical hit damage by 10 / 20 / 30%.
name: Unbound Wrath

description: War Cry, when activated, grants all group members within a 100 foot radius immunity to fear spells for 0 seconds.
name: War Cry

messages: Berserker energy wells up inside you.

description: This passive ability increases your hit point regeneration by 1% per 6 seconds. Requirements: Level: 30
name: Warrior's Endurance

description: Improved Familiar, when activated, triggers *100Improved Familiar, the physical manifestation of your familiar, increases the damage dealt by your critical direct damage spells by 3%, the casting level of your spells by 9, your cold, disease, fire, magic, and poison resistances by 25 points, your mana regeneration by 6 points, your maximum mana by 200 points, and allows you to see invisible creatures.
name: Improved Familiar

rankSpells.name: Improved Familiar I
rankSpells.description: Triggers *$13%N, the physical manifestation of your familiar. Increases the damage dealt by your critical direct damage spells by #5%, the casting level of your spells by #9, your cold, disease, fire, magic, and poison resistances by #2 points, your mana regeneration by #12 points, your maximum mana by #11 points, and allows you to see invisible creatures.

description: Mana Burn, when activated, consumes up to 3000 mana to deal 3000x of the consumed mana as direct damage and prevents additional Mana Burn spells from landing on that target for 1m.
name: Mana Burn

description: This ability, when activated, roots your target in place for up to 48 seconds with a 300 point resist modifier and a 2 second cast time.
name: Strong Root

messages: Your feet adhere to the ground.

description: Increases your chance to land critical strikes with direct damage spells by 2%. Level 12
name: Unbound Destruction

description: Improves the base damage of your melee attacks and the power of your damaging and healing abilities by 2 / 4%. Complete slayer achievements to progress this ability.
